title: affaan-m/ECC
summary: ECC is a performance optimization system for agent harnesses, enhancing skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development for AI coding tools like Claude Code and Cursor.
chinese_summary: ECC 是一个针对代理框架的性能优化系统，增强技能、直觉、记忆、安全性及研究优先开发，适用于 Claude Code、Cursor 等 AI 编码工具。
